title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Good morning, everybody. I'm going to show you how I spend my day. I slept in today and had kind of a slow morning. But I checked the weather and it looks like it's going to be a gorgeous day.
